query: SELECT applicationId, q1_current_investments, q2_investment_period, q3_price_volatility, q4_investment_percentage, q5_investment_attitude, q6_derivatives_knowledge, q7_age_group, q8_education_level, q9_investment_knowledge_sources, q10_liquidity_needs, totalScore, riskLevel FROM risk_questionnaires WHERE totalScore IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;
